description: A luminous painting of the Venetian lagoon with boats on shimmering water. In the foreground, a dark gondola or fishing boat with several figures occupies the lower right. Behind it, more boats with colored sails dot the water. The distant skyline of Venice is visible as a pale strip across the horizon, with domes and a bell tower faintly discernible. The sky is vast and pale blue with scattered white clouds, dominating the upper two-thirds of the composition. The water reflects the sky in shimmering blues and greens. The atmosphere is hazy and luminous.

_meta.title: View to Saint Mark's Square, Venice
